title: Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account even after multiple password reset attempts.

title: Payment Failed
description: User reports payment failure while completing the purchase using credit card.

title: Update Not Saving
description: Changes made to profile information are not being saved properly.

title: Dashboard Loading
description: User experiencing slow loading times when accessing dashboard analytics.

title: Subscription Renewal Failed
description: Customer subscription renewal payment did not go through.

title: Email Verification Not Received
description: User did not receive verification email after signing up.

title: Error 500 on Order Page
description: Internal server error appears when user tries to access order history.

title: Incorrect Billing Amount
description: Customer charged incorrect amount for premium subscription.

title: App Crashes on Startup
description: Mobile application crashes immediately after launching.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested refund but has not received confirmation.
